answers: Top manga: One Piece, Naruto, Attack on Titan, Dragon Ball, Death Note, Fullmetal Alchemist, Demon Slayer.
Manga vs comics: manga is Japanese, read right-to-left, typically black & white. Comics are western, left-to-right, color.
Read manga: MangaPlus (official, free), physical volumes, or library. Support creators by buying official releases.
Manga genres: shonen (action, for boys), shojo (romance, for girls), seinen (mature), josei (women's), and isekai (another world).
